commit.message:
docs(auth): entity-centric access redesign design doc (#1069)

* docs(auth): design doc for entity-centric access redesign [#1020]

Comprehensive design for redesigning defineAccess() with entity-centric
configuration, structured limit scoping, plan versioning, grandfathering,
add-ons, overrides, billing integration, and data residency strategy.

Includes adversarial reviews from all 5 agent personas (ben, nora, ava,
mike, josh) with findings addressed in the design doc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(auth): address re-review findings — cloud failure modes, phases, fixes [#1020]

- Add cloud failure mode specification (closed/open/cached)
- Add implementation phases outline (7 phases with dependencies)
- Fix contradictory Stripe sync sentence (payments vs access source of truth)
- Add brand entity to example (fixes scope: 'brand' referencing undefined entity)
- Include all 5 re-review reports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(auth): implementation plan — 7 phase tickets for access redesign [#1020]

Self-contained phase plans with BDD acceptance criteria, file maps,
and context references so any agent can pick up and implement.

Phase 1: Entity restructuring + entitlements (foundation)
Phase 2: Plans + limits + billing foundations
Phase 3: Overrides + advanced limits
Phase 4: Versioning + grandfathering
Phase 5: Billing integration (Stripe)
Phase 6: Cloud storage + data residency
Phase 7: Client-side + UI components

Also moves local-phase-workflow, bdd-acceptance-criteria, and
ticket-system rules from backstage to vertz repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(settings): wire SetupUI subsystem for data provider setup flows

Close 6 wiring gaps preventing provider setups from working end-to-end
(traced via essentials:speedometer → GPS speed provider flow):

1. Setup button visibility uses SetupEvaluator instead of isAvailable —
   shows setup when permissions unsatisfied regardless of GPS hardware
2. Promote evaluateWithPersistence() to SetupEvaluator interface —
   eliminates ClassCastException from `as SetupEvaluatorImpl` in SetupSheet
3. Fix stale snapshot in setup onSettingChanged — read fresh layout state
   per invocation so multi-key writes accumulate correctly
4. Namespace provider setup keys with `setup:{providerId}:` prefix —
   prevents collision with feature settings in the shared settings map
5. Reactive provider availability via connectionState flow collection —
   status dot updates live when GPS/BT toggled while sheet is open
6. effectiveSelection mirrors WidgetDataBinder resolution — prefers first
   available provider instead of unconditional firstOrNull()
7. Fail-fast on unsupported serialization types in SettingsSerialization —
   throws on unknown types, handles Enum (as name string) and Unit,
   keeps j: decode for backward compat

commit.message:
fix: Google STT audio focus conflict + increase transcription timeout

Google STT was immediately cancelling because:
1. We request AUDIOFOCUS_GAIN_TRANSIENT
2. SpeechRecognizer internally also requests audio focus
3. Our listener gets AUDIOFOCUS_LOSS → auto-stops recording
4. Result is empty → "No speech detected" → voice mode exits

Fix: Skip requestAudioFocus() for Google STT mode — SpeechRecognizer
manages its own audio focus.

Also increased local transcription timeout from 60s to 180s — benchmark
shows 96s for 3s audio on some devices (32x real-time factor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix tab reorder drag by restoring no-drag on tabs container

The inherited -webkit-app-region: drag on the tabs container was
intercepting HTML5 drag events, preventing tab reorder drops.
Restored no-drag on the container and added a programmatic window
drag handler for empty space clicks between/beyond tabs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: external editor/viewer launch broken on Windows (used /bin/sh)

LaunchExternalProgram was routing through ProcessHelper.RunDetached
which calls /bin/sh -c "..." — doesn't exist on Windows, fails silently.

Rewrite to use ProcessHelper.TryLaunchArgs (direct ProcessStartInfo) which
works on both platforms. Also handles:
- Quoted paths: "C:\Program Files\prog.exe" flags
- Absolute paths with spaces: treated as single executable (no quoting needed)
- Commands with flags: code --wait, gedit --new-window
- Error dialog if the launch fails instead of silent failure

commit.message:
Release 2.0.5: Modular detection framework, regedit-style settings, and UI fixes

- Add modular change detection framework with 4 methods: SSIM, pHash,
  Edge Detection (Canny), and Background Subtraction (MOG2)
- Per-region detection method override via new region detection dialog
- Regedit-style settings dialog with tree navigation, value table, and
  double-click edit dialogs with full descriptions
- Live detection metrics display in region cards (edge %, similarity, etc.)
- Fix regions staying OK when monitored window is closed (now shows N/A)
- Fix overlay thumbnails stealing keyboard focus on click (WS_EX_NOACTIVATE)
- Remove hardcoded "changed" from alert status bar text
- Reduce UI flicker: change-detection guards on tree, status pills, and
  aggregate badge updates; soft refresh prevents transient N/A flash
- Remove obsolete DWM/WGC tool scripts
- Update README with detection methods reference
- Remove game-specific terminology from code and documentation

- config/mcp-registry.ts: 11 server definitions (Supabase, GitHub, Stripe, Shopify, etc.)
- stores/mcp-store.ts: Client-side Zustand store for MCP state
- types/mcp.ts: Full type system (connectors, tools, permissions, audit)
- 10 API routes: connect, disconnect, discover, tools, tools/run, auth, auth/test, status, registry, audit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement programmatic window drag from tab bar

CSS -webkit-app-region: drag doesn't work on tabs because no-drag
children cover the entire surface. Instead, detect mousedown on
tab body and programmatically move the window via IPC if the mouse
moves beyond a 5px threshold. If released without moving, treat as
a click to select the tab. Grip handle still initiates tab reorder.

  quiet speech on devices with lower mic gain.
- Added RMS energy debug logging for diagnostics.

commit.message:
Add --target npm for ESM package output

New build target that compiles Almide code into a publish-ready npm package:
- index.js with ESM imports and exported public functions
- index.d.ts with TypeScript type declarations
- _runtime/ with only the stdlib modules actually used (tree-shaking)
- package.json with type: "module" and Node.js 22+ engine constraint

Usage: almide build app.almd --target npm [-o dist/]

commit.message:
Fix SGDataClient api_key passed as positional arg (base_url)

SGDataClient(api_key) was setting base_url to the API key string,
causing all requests to fail silently and HDB lot counts to return 0.
Fixed by using the keyword argument: SGDataClient(api_key=api_key).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix infinite loop on homepage section image upload

Root cause: "Join NewBee" and "Training With Us" sections had ~1MB
base64 data URLs stored in the database. When editing any section,
the entire base64 string was sent back in the PUT request payload,
causing timeouts and browser hangs.

Fixes:
- Only send image_url in update payload when it actually changed
  (new file uploaded, image removed, or URL manually edited)
- Migrated existing base64 image URLs to S3 in production DB

commit.message:
docs: Linux の実行コマンドを xvfb + opengl3 に更新

CI での動作確認の結果、headless + vulkan は dummy レンダラーに
フォールバックすることが判明。実際に動作した xvfb-run + opengl3
の組み合わせにドキュメントを合わせる。

- README.md: 使い方・アーキテクチャ図の vulkan → opengl3
- tests/README.md: Linux の実行手順を追加

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz (#7)

* ci: CI上でスクリーンショットを自動生成するように対応

- capture.gd: キャプチャ前に既存の出力ディレクトリのPNGを全削除する _clear_output_dir() を追加
- CI: 最新Godotをダウンロードし、headlessモードでスクリーンショットを生成するステップを追加
- .gitignore: tests/vr_screenshots/ をIgnoreに追加（CI生成物はgit管理不要）
- tests/vr_screenshots/: コミット済みスクリーンショットを削除（CIで毎回生成するため不要）

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): --headless を --display-driver headless に変更してVulkanレンダリングを有効化

--headless は内部で --rendering-driver dummy を強制するため、
SubViewport のテクスチャ取得が失敗していた。
--display-driver headless に変更することでレンダリングドライバの
指定が有効になり、Vulkanでの実レンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* fix(ci): xvfb + OpenGL3 に切り替えてスクリーンショット取得を修正

headless display server + Vulkan の組み合わせはCI環境でVulkanの
初期化に失敗してdummyレンダラーにフォールバックしていた。
xvfb-run で仮想X11ディスプレイを用意し、Mesa ソフトウェア
レンダリング (opengl3) を使うことで実際のレンダリングが可能になる。

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

* docs: Linux の実行コマンドを xvfb + opengl3 に更新

CI での動作確認の結果、headless + vulkan は dummy レンダラーに
フォールバックすることが判明。実際に動作した xvfb-run + opengl3
の組み合わせにドキュメントを合わせる。

- README.md: 使い方・アーキテクチャ図の vulkan → opengl3
- tests/README.md: Linux の実行手順を追加

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JHqiafsF5Do2riJ1oNo2Mz

---------

commit.message:
fix(mcp): add PID file management for stale instance recovery (#59)

When the MCP server crashes or is killed without clean shutdown, the
next startup attempt can fail due to stale state. Add PID file
management to detect and clean up stale instances automatically.

- Write PID to ~/.ouroboros/mcp-server.pid on startup
- Clean up PID file on shutdown (via try/finally)
- Detect stale PIDs on startup using os.kill(pid, 0)
- Add actionable recovery steps in error messages

Closes #59

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(live): corrige DLLFinalize, login event e fluxo de credenciais

- dll_provider.py: Finalize → DLLFinalize (nome correto na DLL)
- dll_provider.py: aceita conn_type 1 ou 2 com result=2 como sinal de login OK
  (DLL reporta Trading logado, não MarketData separado)
- dll_provider.py: timeout aumentado para 60s
- main.py: pula LoginDialog quando credenciais já estão em config_local.py
